title: Pressure Signal Audit Record (PSAR_v1.0)
description: 2A assembler output. Pre-critic. Pre-canonical. Structural cluster proposal awaiting PSCA evaluation. Contract authority: PRESSURE-SIGNAL-AUDIT-RECORD.md v1.0, Structural Assembler Contract v1.1.

proposalID.description: Cycle-scoped sequential cluster proposal ID. Format: PROP_{season}_{phase}_{week:03d}_{ordinal:04d}. Not a canonical CPS ID.

auditSchemaVersion.description: PSAR schema version. Pinned. Must equal PSAR_v1.0.

enumRegistryVersion.description: Pressure enum registry version active at assembly time.

agentVersionSnapshot.description: Agent version identifiers at time of assembly.

actorGroup.description: Normalized cast_requirement enum token. Membership enforced by psar_validator.py, not here.

actionType.description: Normalized snake_case action string. No registry. PSAR-intermediate field only.

objectRole.description: Normalized snake_case object string. No registry. PSAR-intermediate field only.

domainSet.description: Sorted, deduplicated list of normalized pressure_signal_domain tokens. Sort order and membership enforced by psar_validator.py.

clusterSignature.description: Full SHA-256 content-derived cluster signature. Not a canonical ID.

structuralSourceIDs.description: Sorted, deduplicated PLO-2.0 ploIDs that contributed to this cluster.

clusterSize.description: Count of unique structuralSourceIDs. Must equal len(structuralSourceIDs). Enforced by psar_validator.py.

domainDiversityCount.description: Count of unique domains in domainSet. Must equal len(domainSet). Enforced by psar_validator.py.

enumComplianceFlags.description: Per-field normalization resolution flags. All must be true in a valid PSAR.
